directives.text: All external service access must go through MCP servers. Never import SDK clients (supabase, stripe, elevenlabs, openai) directly. If an MCP server is not available for a service, document the gap — do not bypass with a direct SDK.
Stripe is NOT used. Payments are handled by Gumroad externally. Do not install, import, or reference the Stripe SDK anywhere in the codebase.
Supabase access must use the supabase-mcp server, not the supabase-js or supabase-py client library. This applies to auth, database, and storage operations.

The system has a circular auth dependency (Supabase Auth -> Dashboard -> MCP -> Supabase Auth). Cold-start MUST use bootstrap_resolver.py with a service-role key. Normal auth flow takes over after bootstrap.
All external API calls must use the @retry_with_backoff decorator with exponential backoff (2s, 4s, 8s, 16s). Maximum 3 retries. Log each retry with correlation ID.
Every pipeline run must have a unique correlation ID. All log entries for that run must include the correlation ID. Use CorrelationLogger from scripts/utils.py.

Airtable is the source of truth for configuration. Changes in Airtable are detected by backbone_trigger.py and propagated to all services. Do not hardcode configuration that should come from Airtable.
Make.com has been removed from the architecture. The backbone_trigger.py module replaces it for Airtable-to-service synchronization. Do not reference Make.com webhooks.
Video assembly supports 7 built-in templates (gradient_blue, gradient_purple, dark_mode, light_mode, nature, tech, minimal). Users select via --template flag. MoviePy is the video assembly engine.
If ElevenLabs API fails or quota is exhausted, fall back to Google Text-to-Speech (gTTS). Log the fallback with correlation ID and a WARNING level message.
Docker and docker-compose files exist but are UNTESTED. Do not claim Docker deployment is production-ready. Mark as 'created, untested' in all documentation.
The product is sold via Gumroad at $37. The deliverable ZIP (57KB) and product copy (GUMROAD-PASTE-TODAY.txt) are ready. Revenue is $0 because the product has not been listed yet.
